nodes.label: _lastfm_enrichment helper
nodes.rationale: Bridges title-artist-album split to Last.fm match + confidence scoring; returns empty tags when match is None with computed confidence.

nodes.label: One-time Backfill Model
nodes.rationale: Script retires after migration window; no daemon, no cron, no second datastore; CMS remains source of truth.

nodes.label: Idempotent Write Discipline
nodes.rationale: diff_post emits only the fields that changed, allowing safe rerun after partial failure and forbidding overwrites of trusted values unless explicitly identical.

nodes.label: Dry-run By Default
nodes.rationale: --apply must be explicit before any write; dry-run prints planned payload and exits 0.

nodes.label: Transport Probe Gate
nodes.rationale: probe_wordpress_api must report supports_acf_reads AND supports_target_shape before any enumeration; failure aborts before write path.

nodes.label: Confidence-gated Enrichment
nodes.rationale: Three confidence tiers gate overwrites; low confidence rows are reported but never written destructively.

nodes.label: Preserve Relisten and Unreleased
nodes.rationale: Business rule invariant: one post = one listening event; relistens stay in previous-listen-posts; unreleased boolean semantics preserved across reshape.
